headline: Oracle Project Jupiter Puts AI Growth And Debt Risks In Focus
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has launched a high-profile Project Jupiter data center advertising campaign in New Mexico, highlighting economic and environmental benefits. The campaign emphasizes sustainable infrastructure spending, local job creation, and cooperation with regional utilities. At the same time, investors are watching Oracle's growing use of debt and private credit to finance rapid AI data center expansion. Some lenders are reportedly pulling back from this exposure, prompting questions...
